---
title: Miss Potter
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779807568/misscharity_z6gh2w.png
description: Beatrix Potter dans le film Miss Potter
categories: [fanart]
date: 2026-01-09
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779807568/misscharity_z6gh2w.png)
